tools.name: make_call
tools.description: Initiate a real outbound phone call via a KaiCalls AI agent

tools.name: check_call_status
tools.description: Check the status of a call by its ID

tools.name: list_recent_calls
tools.description: List recent calls for the authenticated business

tools.name: get_transcript
tools.description: Get the transcript and summary of a completed call

tools.name: get_call_recording
tools.description: Get the real call recording URL for a call so reviewers can listen to the voice/audio instead of relying only on the transcript.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List KaiCalls agents available to the authenticated account

tools.name: get_business_info
tools.description: Get business information, agent count, and recent call stats

tools.name: get_operational_settings
tools.description: Audit the business-level operational setup Claude needs before changing a client account: staff alert recipients, SMS/email alert flags, escalation rules, textable send-link entries, and assigned agent voice/model/greeting metadata.

tools.name: configure_staff_alerts
tools.description: Configure business-owned staff alert recipients and post-call escalation rules. Use this for emergency/urgent texts, callback alerts, billing/provider follow-up alerts, and ensuring alerts go only to the correct business staff.

tools.name: configure_textable_links
tools.description: Create or repair the business_links entries used by the send_link/send_sms tools. Use this when callers need booking, directions, cancellation, sister-location, or service-specific links texted without exposing raw URLs in the voice prompt.

tools.name: configure_agent_business_rules
tools.description: Safely add or replace a named operational rules section inside an agent inbound prompt, then route the prompt patch through the governed agent.patch broker. Use this for cross-business handoffs, callback language, alert promises, and client-specific operating rules without round-tripping the whole p

tools.name: list_leads
tools.description: List leads for the authenticated business, with optional status/source/agent filters. Includes the latest AI lead score when available.

tools.name: get_lead
tools.description: Get full details for a single lead by ID, including the latest AI lead score and explanation.

tools.name: list_voicemails
tools.description: List recent voicemails for the authenticated business, including transcripts and recording URLs.

tools.name: list_sms_messages
tools.description: List recent SMS messages for the authenticated business. Filter by conversation or direction (inbound/outbound).

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List outbound call campaigns for the authenticated business.

tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Create an outbound call campaign (cadence + lead batch) and optionally launch it immediately. Launching queues calls for the orchestrator; existing TCPA/consent gating still applies at dial time. Requires admin role on the business.

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Get a dashboard summary (lead counts by status, conversion rate, call volume and duration, top agents, and business outcomes by type) over a recent time window.

tools.name: upsert_lead
tools.description: Create a new lead or update existing leads for the authenticated business, routed through the governed leads API (business access-checked, usage-logged, and audited). To create one, pass `lead` with at least one of name/phone/email plus optional status/source/notes/agent_id/etc. To update, pass `upd

tools.name: send_sms
tools.description: Send an outbound text message from one of your agents' phone lines to a recipient, routed through the governed messaging API. Compliance gates (opt-out / Do-Not-Call / quiet-hours), rate limits, and message logging all apply. Provide from_agent_id (the sending agent), to (recipient phone in E.164),

tools.name: update_agent_config
tools.description: Edit an agent's live runtime configuration — greeting/first message, inbound or SMS prompt, voice, language model, max call duration, and call-transfer settings — routed through the governed update broker so every change keeps the consent + audit trail (a versioned config snapshot and change history

tools.name: request_kaicalls_update
tools.description: Ask the KaiCalls on-behalf update broker to perform a scoped, governed mutation. Supported intents: phone.emergency_address.set, transcripts.sink.configure, agent.patch. Prefer update_agent_config for prompt/voice/model edits, configure_agent_business_rules for a single named operational prompt sect

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: List recent API usage events (endpoint, method, status code, cost) for the caller's account. Mirrors GET /api/v1/usage.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get per-business minutes-used and subscription status across every business the caller can access. Mirrors GET /api/v1/balance.

tools.name: list_numbers
tools.description: List phone numbers owned by the accessible business(es), with capability and compliance flags. Mirrors GET /api/v1/numbers.

tools.name: list_conversations
tools.description: List SMS conversation threads (counterparty timeline metadata) for the authenticated business, most recent first. Mirrors GET /api/v1/sms/conversations.

tools.name: get_conversation
tools.description: Get a single SMS conversation thread by ID. Mirrors GET /api/v1/sms/conversations?id=.

tools.name: get_webhook
tools.description: List the configured outbound webhook(s) for a business, including supported event types. Mirrors GET /api/v1/webhooks.

tools.name: set_webhook
tools.description: Create or update a business outbound webhook (URL + subscribed events). Returns a webhook secret on first creation only. Mirrors POST /api/v1/webhooks.

tools.name: delete_webhook
tools.description: Remove a business outbound webhook by ID. Mirrors DELETE /api/v1/webhooks.

tools.name: list_evals
tools.description: List canned mock-conversation eval scenarios for an agent (or all accessible agents). Mirrors GET /api/v1/evals.

tools.name: run_eval
tools.description: Run a single eval scenario (eval_id) or every scenario for an agent (agent_id) against its live Vapi assistant and grade the result. Bills Vapi compute. Mirrors POST /api/v1/evals/run.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List the curated, credential-free voice catalog (id, display name, accent, language, gender, sample URL) used to configure agent voices. Mirrors GET /api/v1/voices.

tools.name: create_agent
tools.description: Create a new KaiCalls voice agent (Vapi assistant + KaiCalls records) with a system prompt, greeting, voice, and model. Mirrors POST /api/v1/agents. Every subsequent mutation to this agent is versioned (assistant_config_versions) and reversible via rollback_config — inspect history with get_change_h

tools.name: attach_number
tools.description: Assign a phone number already in the KaiCalls registry pool to a business (and optionally route it directly to an agent). Does NOT purchase a new number — use search_available_numbers + buy_number for that. Mirrors POST /api/v1/phone-numbers.

tools.name: detach_number
tools.description: Release a phone number from a business back to the unassigned registry pool. Mirrors DELETE /api/v1/phone-numbers.

tools.name: search_available_numbers
tools.description: Search the carrier for phone numbers available to purchase (real-time Twilio inventory lookup). Mirrors GET /api/v1/phone-numbers/search.

tools.name: buy_number
tools.description: Purchase a real phone number from the carrier and register it to a business. This spends real money — the number is billed by the carrier immediately. Does not auto-attach an agent; call attach_number afterward to route it. Mirrors POST /api/v1/phone-numbers/purchase. Compliance: KaiCalls automatica

tools.name: list_knowledge
tools.description: List agent knowledge base entries for a business. Mirrors GET /api/v1/knowledge.

tools.name: upsert_knowledge
tools.description: Create a new agent knowledge base entry, or update one when `id` is provided. Mirrors POST /api/v1/knowledge. Creating requires title, content, and content_type.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List a business's agent product catalog. Mirrors GET /api/v1/products.

tools.name: upsert_product
tools.description: Create a new product row, or update one when `id` is provided. Mirrors POST /api/v1/products. Creating requires name and business_id. Pass `quantity` to set/update inventory.

tools.name: list_config_versions
tools.description: List an agent's hashed, redacted assistant config version history (rollback lineage included). Pass `version` to fetch one version's full redacted config_snapshot instead of the list. Mirrors GET /api/v1/agents/versions.

tools.name: get_change_history
tools.description: List an agent's recent config-change audit trail (change_type, change_source, old/new value, timestamp) from admin_change_history — the same record the admin_get_change_history voice tool reads over the phone. Every mutation KaiCalls makes to an agent (via update_agent_config, configure_agent_busine

tools.name: rollback_config
tools.description: Roll an agent's deployed voice configuration back to a prior assistant_config_versions snapshot — restoring greeting, voice, prompt, and scalar model params (never secrets/credentials) onto the live agent. Wraps the same version-restore logic as POST /api/v1/agents/rollback and the admin_rollback_ch

tools.name: list_observability_events
tools.description: List a business-scoped timeline of compact call-runtime events and redacted integration-delivery attempts. Mirrors GET /api/v1/observability-events and uses bounded keyset pagination.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "set_webhook" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Create or update a business outbound webhook (URL + subscribed events). Returns a webhook secret on first creation only. Mirrors POST /api/v1/webhooks.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_change_history" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: List an agent's recent config-change audit trail (change_type, change_source, old/new value, timestamp) from admin_change_history — the same record the admin_ge…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "rollback_config" references sensitive artifacts (credentials, secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Roll an agent's deployed voice configuration back to a prior assistant_config_versions snapshot — restoring greeting, voice, prompt, and scalar model params (ne…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_transcript, get_call_recording, get_operational_settings, list_voicemails, list_sms_messages, list_conversations, get_conversation, list_voices · Private data: set_webhook, list_voices, create_agent, get_change_history, rollback_config · Public sink: get_operational_settings, configure_staff_alerts, list_sms_messages, upsert_lead, send_sms, update_agent_config, request_kaicalls_update, list_conversations, get_conversation, get_webhook, set_webhook, delete_webhook, run_eval, create_agent, attach_number, buy_number, upsert_knowledge, upsert_product, rollback_config · Destructive: delete_webhook, list_evals, run_eval, detach_number.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_transcript, get_call_recording, get_operational_settings, list_voicemails, list_sms_messages, list_conversations, get_conversation, list_voices · Private data: set_webhook, list_voices, create_agent, get_change_history, rollback_config · Public sink: get_operational_settings, configure_staff_alerts, list_sms_messages, upsert_lead, send_sms, update_agent_config, request_kaicalls_update, list_conversations, get_conversation, get_webhook, set_webhook, delete_webhook, run_eval, create_agent, attach_number, buy_number, upsert_knowledge, upsert_product, rollback_config · Destructive: delete_webhook, list_evals, run_eval, detach_number

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
